Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Charity]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Charity is an Akura aunt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Charity does not tolerate cheating.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Charity is a Sage with purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Charity is Mercy's aunt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy must report to Charity for transport after advancing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Charity is a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Charity has purple eyes.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Charity is Lindon's acquaintance/peer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Charity provides training programs for Coppers in close combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Charity took Lindon through examples of movement, weapon, and defensive techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Charity uses a silver-and-purple owl as part of her living Forger technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Charity's Forger technique involves owls made of her own madra, which is a blend of shadow and dream aspects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Charity has a silver-and-purple owl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Charity is an Archlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Charity gave Lindon the transmission construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Charity is concerned about the safety of the teams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Charity wears sacred arts robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Charity watches the arena from her mansion on the Akura floating mountain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Charity watched Lindon on the display in the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Charity provides scales to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Charity believes the dragon girl might become a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Charity watched Yerin blindfold herself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Charity possesses madra that causes Dross headaches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Charity was astonished by the fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Charity is someone Lindon does not want to look in the eye right now.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Charity is a member of the Akura head family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Charity floated behind Mercy during the Uncrowned ceremony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Charity stood behind Mercy with an owl on her shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Charity widened a pool of darkness beneath the feet of Mercy and Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Charity keeps a storehouse at the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Charity's sixth technique is the Dream of Darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Charity is a person Lindon wants to convince to send him along.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Charity is a Sage in the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Charity uses a Striker technique that creates silver-and-purple madra specters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Charity is the daughter of an unnamed individual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Charity can vanish into a pool of shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Charity gave a warning to the Seishen King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Charity suggested she would return to meet with Akura Fury soon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Charity was supposed to take Lindon back to the tournament in two days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Charity noted Lindon's reservation at the Sundown Pavilion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Charity is Fury's daughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Charity has an owl perched on her shoulder and is the daughter of a man who needs to return to Sky's Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Charity will be handling Lindon's training directly alongside Min Shuei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Charity has previously taken Lindon to Sky’s Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Charity is located in Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Charity instructed Yerin to cycle the power to her head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Charity set up a boundary field in which Yerin was trapped.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Charity performed a spiritual scan on Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Charity investigated Yan Shoumei's Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Charity provided Yerin access to the records of the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Charity restrained Min Shuei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Charity is an Overlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Charity stated that fighting a Blood Shadow is the best willpower training.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Charity is the Sage of the Silver Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Charity's face was a mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Charity is taking care of Lindon's points.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Charity had a long exchange with Uncle Fury that no one else could hear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Charity is preparing Lindon and Yerin's exit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Charity expanded the Sky’s Edge gate into a broad screen of darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Charity possesses a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Charity wields a silver sickle as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Charity wields a steel shield with the image of a twisted, grinning, monstrous face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Charity uses a sacred instrument of concealment and banishment made of liquid steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Charity uses three sacred instruments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Charity uses a column of darkness to travel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Charity has an owl that communicates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Charity used shields of purple-and-silver madra to protect a string of ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Charity provided information to Lindon and Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon would have to thank Charity upon their return.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Charity has opened portals and brought techniques to life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Charity had not commanded Dreadgods directly.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Charity is one of the two remaining pillars of the Akura family with Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Charity is Akura Malice's granddaughter.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Charity watches the city of Moongrave from across the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Charity is a member of the head family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Charity has never attempted to advance to Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Charity is over a hundred and fifty years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Charity swore an oath to Akura Malice not to reveal the connection between Dreadgods and Monarchs without permission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Charity reached the Archlord stage relatively young and became a Sage not long after.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Charity intervened to help Lindon retreat from the Titan's attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Charity's spiritual perception passed over the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Charity uses the Will-Heart Resonance technique from her Book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Charity can cleanse techniques using a silver flash from Min Shuei's soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Charity specializes in mental Enforcer techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Charity carries a vibrating sickle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Charity took Mercy to Moongrave.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Charity is a lesser sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Charity has a connection to the Heart Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Charity is hard-pressed to deal with a single attack from the Dreadgod weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Charity has awakened the Heart Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Charity's techniques are suited to the role of jailer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Charity can overcome mental enhancements with the aid of script formation in a cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Charity seemed all right during the fight against shadow swords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Malice was betrayed by Charity.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Charity is in charge of the Ashwind continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Charity has a territory.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
